name: Southwest Rapid Rewards® Premier Business Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: 60,000 bonus Rapid Rewards points after spending $3,000 in first 3 months. Additional 10,000 bonus miles when adding an authorized user.

earning_rates.notes: Up to $8,000 per year in combined gas and restaurant purchases
Up to $8,000 per year in combined gas and restaurant purchases

annual_credits.name: Anniversary Points
annual_credits.description: 6,000 Rapid Rewards anniversary points each year (worth ~$89 at 1.49¢/point)

other_benefits.name: First Bag Free
other_benefits.description: First checked bag free for cardmember and up to 8 companions on the same reservation

other_benefits.name: EarlyBird Check-In
other_benefits.description: Complimentary EarlyBird Check-In automatically applied to all reservations

other_benefits.name: Employee Cards at No Cost
other_benefits.description: Add employee cards at no additional cost

other_benefits.name: Global Entry/TSA PreCheck
other_benefits.description: Up to $120 credit for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck every 4 years

other_benefits.name: Earn Companion Pass Qualifying Points
other_benefits.description: Earn 1,000 toward Companion Pass qualification for each $10,000 spent annually

other_benefits.name: Earn PQP
other_benefits.description: Earn 1,000 Premier Qualifying Points (PQP) per $12,000 spent, up to 2,000 PQP per year

notes: Mid-tier Southwest business card. $149 AF. 6,000 anniversary points (~$89) covers ~60% of AF. First bag free + EarlyBird Check-In are practical perks. As of 2025, AF increased from $99 to $149. PQP earnings help toward Southwest elite status. The $8K combined cap on gas/restaurant 2x is limited but useful for small businesses. Similar to personal Premier but with employee card benefits.
